user.title: Add XeWe LED
user.description: Enter the IP address shown by the device on your network.

pair.title: Pair XeWe LED
pair.description: The device at {host} is in discovery mode. The broker address and login are pre-filled from Home Assistant. Adjust them only if the device cannot connect (for example, if the broker requires a dedicated username and password), then Submit to send them to the device.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the device. Make sure it is still in discovery mode (press 'y' on the device to re-enter it), then try again.
error.no_broker: Could not determine a broker address reachable by the device. Enter one manually.

abort.no_mac: The device did not advertise a MAC address and cannot be identified.
